expected_observations.cold_draft_increases: Cold draft posterior rises from prior 0.30 to ~0.57 given cold_spots=yes, sharing explanatory weight with ghost
expected_observations.creaky_floors_increases: Creaky floors posterior rises from unconditional 0.22 to ~0.59, driven by the high raccoon posterior
expected_observations.ghost_posterior_increases: Ghost posterior rises from prior 0.05 to ~0.52 given cold_spots=yes and flickering_lights=yes, a 10x increase reflecting strong evidence for a supernatural explanation
expected_observations.raccoon_posterior_high: Raccoon posterior rises from prior 0.20 to ~0.81 given muddy footprints (P(muddy|raccoon)=0.85 vs P(muddy|no raccoon)=0.05)
expected_observations.wiring_fault_increases: Wiring fault posterior rises from prior 0.15 to ~0.52 given flickering lights, but less than ghost because ghost also explains cold_spots

notes.description: Golden expected output for the Haunted House Bayesian inference scenario. Posteriors are computed via exact variable elimination over the 8-variable BIF model given evidence cold_spots=yes, flickering_lights=yes, footprints=muddy. VE and JT posteriors must match exactly. LBP and Gibbs are approximate and may differ within tolerance.

gibbs_sampling.note: Stochastic MCMC sampling. Results vary between runs without a fixed seed. With 10000 samples and burn-in of 1000, posteriors should be within 0.05 of exact values.

junction_tree.note: Should match VE posteriors exactly (both are exact inference methods)

loopy_bp.note: Approximate message-passing inference. On tree-structured subgraphs (raccoon -> footprints, raccoon -> creaky_floors) LBP converges to exact values. Small deviations possible on the ghost/cold_draft/wiring_fault subgraph due to loops.

variable_elimination.note: Exact posteriors for all unobserved variables given evidence. Ghost prior 0.05 increases dramatically to ~0.52 because both cold_spots=yes and flickering_lights=yes are strong indicators.
